title: Gooey Sickness Ukrainian Yams Stir-fry
description: This diabetic-friendly stir-fried dish features gooey, earthy yams with single cream for a comforting and indulgent sick-day meal.

ingredients.name: Yams
ingredients.notes: Choose firm yams for best results.

ingredients.name: Single cream
ingredients.notes: Use full-fat single cream for the gooey texture.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: For added depth and heat, adjust to taste.

instructions: Wash the yams thoroughly and cut them into small cubes.
In a pan, heat a bit of oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add yam pieces to the pan with single cream. Stir-fry for another 5-7 minutes or until yams are tender but still have an earthy texture.
Stir in red pepper flakes and salt, tasting as you go to adjust seasoning.
Once everything is well combined, transfer the mixture into a preheated oven-safe dish.
Bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown on top. Serve warm with some sour cream or plain yogurt for an extra layer of flavor and nutrition.
